title: Policy: Policy applied - Restart Headset - Settings stay locked
scenario: Policy-locked settings become editable after headset restart despite policy being applied via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly Bluetooth headset.
3. Go to Device Settings and apply a policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
4. Confirm the policy is applied and the locked settings are grayed out/unchangeable in the app.
5. Power off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
6. Power on the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until it reconnects.
7. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Device Settings for the headset.
8. Attempt to change the previously locked settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
expected: After restarting the headset, the policy-locked settings should remain locked and unchangeable in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
